title: Agents, Workflows, and the Control Loop · Operations Recall
summary: Compare a fixed workflow with an adaptive tool-using agent. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for an agent-system boundary map after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Distinguish predefined workflows from model-directed agents and choose the simpler sufficient architecture.
Model the observe, decide, act, and verify cycle with explicit state transitions.
Separate model context, application state, external state, and durable records.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
